# Ferre Torres B.V.

Ferre Torres B.V. is a Dutch B.V. providing AI consultancy and AI-first software development for companies in Europe.

Primary positioning:
- AI consultancy for companies
- AI-first transformation and AI-first development
- Company Brain systems
- RAG and agentic AI systems
- Finance intelligence, dashboards, and internal AI-native software

Core service pages:
- https://ferretorres.eu/ai-consultancy.html
- https://ferretorres.eu/company-brain.html
- https://ferretorres.eu/rag-agentic-systems.html
- https://ferretorres.eu/ai-software-engineering.html

Delivery model:
Start with one high-value workflow, validate it through an MVP or PoC, then scale the systems that work into production infrastructure.

Contact:
jferre@ferretorres.eu
